articles.summary: YoCausal基于认知科学VoE范式构建两层基准，评估视频扩散模型是否真正理解因果关系，解决现有基准过度依赖合成数据、泛化到真实场景困难的问题。

articles.summary: 针对视觉语言任务中可验证奖励方法难以处理多准则监督的问题，提出基于稳健评分规则的强化学习（Robust Rubric Rewards），利用细粒度评分提升部分可验证任务上的训练效果。

articles.title: When Should Models Change Their Minds? Contextual Belief Management in Large Language Models
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon interactions require language models to manage accumulating information: when to update their state, when to preserve their state, and what to ignore. articles.summary: 提出Contextual Belief Management（CBM）问题，并引入BeliefTrack基准，测量LLM在长程交互中根据证据更新信念、隔离噪声的能力。

articles.title: LaRA: Layer-wise Representation Analysis for Detecting Data Contamination in RL Post-Training
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has shown to improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, there has been little exploration on the problem of data contamination in RL post-training, potentially undermining generalization and evaluation reliability of the training process itself. Existing detection methods primarily rely on output-level signals such as likelihood or entropy
articles.summary: LaRA通过层表示分析检测RL后训练中的数据污染，超越基于似然或熵的输出级信号，提升LLM推理泛化与评估可靠性。

To tackle these emerging threats, we propose a lightweight and scalable agent safety alignment fra
articles.summary: AgentDoG 1.5提出轻量可扩展的智能体安全对齐框架，针对开放世界环境（如OpenClaw）中的新型风险，强化防御能力。

articles.title: TRACE: Toulmin-based Reasoning Assessment through Constructive Elements for LLM CoT Evaluation

Existing metrics rely on final-answer accuracy or surface-level statistics, leaving the reasoning process itself unexamined. We introduce TRACE (Toulmin-based Reasoning Assessment through Constructive Elements), a metric that analyzes Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning processes. R
articles.summary: TRACE基于图尔敏论证模型，分析LLM思维链推理过程中的构造要素，提供不依赖最终答案的推理质量评估指标。

articles.excerpt: World models for interactive video generation have largely focused on single-agent settings, where future observations are generated from a single control signal. articles.title: Self-Improving Language Models with Bidirectional Evolutionary Search
articles.excerpt: Search has been proposed as an effective method for self-improving language models and agentic systems, both for post-training sample generation and for inference. articles.title: Rethinking Memory as Continuously Evolving Connectivity

articles.excerpt: Diffusion Transformers achieve strong video generation quality, but the quadratic cost of full attention limits efficiency.
